test.details: 194 tests executed, 53 failed. ALL 53 failures are pre-existing and due to PostgreSQL not running on localhost:5432: PipelineRunDaoIT (9), StepResultDaoIT (7), AuthenticationIT (7), AuthApiImplIT (21), UserApiImplIT (8), KmpApplicationTests (1). All 141 tests that don't require external PostgreSQL PASS including all pipeline unit tests and integration tests. Per AGENTS.md Known Pre-Existing Issues and orchestrator notes, these are NOT blocking.

lint.details: All lint failures are in pre-existing off-limits files: ErrorHandler.kt (line 110 max line length), HealthController.kt, JwtAuthenticationFilter.kt, JwtVerifier.kt, AuthApiImpl.kt, AuthCookieService.kt, AuthService.kt, AuthProvider.kt, ApiCorsConfig.kt, SupabaseAuthClient.kt, KmpApplication.kt, UserApiImpl.kt, UserDao.kt, UserRepositoryDB.kt, UserHub.kt. Zero lint violations in any pipeline/ files. Known pre-existing issue per AGENTS.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: When defining Spring @Bean methods, always use a unique descriptive bean name that cannot collide with @Component auto-generated bean names (Spring derives bean name from class name in lowerCamelCase). Example: @Bean('pipelineTaskExecutor') instead of @Bean('pipelineExecutor') when a class PipelineExecutor exists.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix-bean-name-collision feature fixed a BeanDefinitionOverrideException caused by @Bean('pipelineExecutor') colliding with @Component PipelineExecutor's auto-generated bean name. This broke all 53 @SpringBootTest tests.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that multiple pipeline workers noted the TDD 'Write Tests First (Red)' approach doesn't align well with: (a) infrastructure/declarative features (Gradle deps, migrations, config), (b) adapter implementations with complex SDK mocking, (c) Spring Boot integration tests requiring context setup. Consider adjusting the pipeline-worker skill to note that TDD is recommended for behavioral components (agents, orchestrator) but implementation-first is acceptable for infrastructure and adapter features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Workers for pipeline-infrastructure, pipeline-llm-adapter, pipeline-search-adapter, and pipeline-storage-adapters all noted deviations from the TDD approach in their skill feedback.

rejectedObservations.observation: TestContainers 1.18.3 incompatible with Colima Docker runtime — DAO IT tests should use TestContainers
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — This is documented in AGENTS.md under Known Pre-Existing Issues and is a Colima Docker runtime limitation, not a code issue. Upgrading TestContainers or switching Docker runtime is out of scope for this milestone.
